## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build LocalChat.sln`
- [ ] `dotnet test LocalChat.sln`

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] Config changes documented (if needed)
- [ ] No secrets/tokens added
- [ ] Scope is focused and reviewable
